Star Atlas DAO Updates

  Attention POLIS holders and POLIS Voting Power enthusiasts  

The Star Atlas DAO Council provided an exciting update on many things today, such as:
The Foundation’s ongoing efforts to explore exchange listings for POLIS & ATLAS,New PIP ideas and the votes required for them to advance to the next phase of the process,Recently passed PIPs,What the Council has been working on,
